description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, including several mature trees and a well-maintained lawn. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout with large windows and multiple wooden doors, providing ample natural light and access to the outdoors. The backyard includes a blue swimming pool and a patio area, partially shaded by trees, ideal for relaxation and recreation. The front yard is open and grassy, bordered by trees for privacy, while the rear and side yards are enclosed by a low wall. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the natural wood accents on doors and window frames. The overall design emphasizes openness, outdoor living, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, wood accents, and lush landscaping, featuring a backyard pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a spacious lawn bordered by trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat roof, backyard pool, patio area, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_2: Rear view with clear visibility of the pool, patio, and multiple access points to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and a mix of open and shaded outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and doors
